channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Behind-the-Scenes Moments of James Dean and Elizabeth Taylor’s Double on the Set of 'Giant'
item.description: During the production of the 1956 epic film 'Giant' in Marfa, Texas, photographer Frank Worth captured a series of candid, behind-the-scenes images featuring James Dean and Valley Keene, Elizabeth Tay...

item.title: Voter Registration for Barangay and SK Elections Closes with Over 5 Million Applicants
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) reported that more than 5.1 million Filipinos submitted applications to vote in this year’s Barangay and Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) elections, with registration of...

item.title: Exploring Five Contemporary Love Poems Inspired by Sangam Tradition
item.description: This article presents an excerpt from Kala Krishnan’s book 'Boundary Commissions: Love Poems', showcasing five modern-day poems inspired by the Sangam literary tradition of Tamil Nadu. The poems blend...

item.title: Good Life Show 2026 launches IMBO Theatre of Taste for interactive culinary experiences
item.description: The Good Life Show Africa is set to redefine the culinary event landscape in 2026 with the launch of the IMBO Theatre of Taste. This 250m² immersive food arena, featured at both the Cape Town and Joha...

item.title: Harry Styles Tour Team Reviews Staging After Fan Complaints About Obstructed Views in Amsterdam
item.description: Fans attending the opening shows of Harry Styles’ new ‘Together, Together’ tour in Amsterdam have voiced concerns over obstructed views from certain premium floor sections. The issues, which surfaced ...

item.title: UK inflation falls to 2.8% in April due to lower energy prices, but experts warn of rises ahead from Middle East tensions
item.description: The UK’s Consumer Prices Index (CPI) inflation rate decreased to 2.8% in April, down from 3.3% in March, marking the lowest level in over a year. This drop was larger than expected and was primarily d...

item.title: SAQA Removes Over 1,100 Outdated Qualifications to Modernise Skills Development
item.description: The South African Qualifications Authority (SAQA) has taken decisive steps to modernise the country's skills framework by removing over 1,100 outdated qualifications from the national register. Accord...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Plans Post-'Late Show' Projects Including a 'Lord of the Rings' Film
item.description: Stephen Colbert is preparing to conclude his tenure as host of 'The Late Show' on CBS, a role famously held by David Letterman. While the exact details of his next career moves remain flexible, Colber...

item.title: Paris Audience Poses With Dalmatian Dogs After 1961 Screening of Disney Classic
item.description: On December 14, 1961, Parisian spectators attended a screening of Walt Disney’s animated classic 'One Hundred and One Dalmatians' on the Champs-Elysees, an event that drew notable attention for its un...

item.title: Kim Kardashian Discusses Taking Approximately 35 Supplements Daily on Podcast
item.description: Kim Kardashian shared details about her extensive daily supplement routine during an appearance on Amy Poehler’s podcast 'Good Hang' on May 19. The 45-year-old reality star disclosed that she consumes...

item.title: US Tech Lobby Groups Critique Labor’s Proposed Media Bargaining Incentive
item.description: The Australian Labor government’s draft legislation for a news bargaining incentive, released in April 2026, has once again drawn criticism from US tech companies. Meta and Google swiftly condemned th...

item.title: Raja Pervaiz Ashraf Reacts to Allegations Mentioned by Suspected Drug Dealer Pinky
item.description: Former Prime Minister and senior PPP leader Raja Pervaiz Ashraf has expressed shock after a video surfaced on May 18 in which alleged drug queenpin Anmol, known as Pinky, mentioned his name during a c...

item.title: Stephen Colbert Reveals Unused Graphics as 'Late Show' Nears End
item.description: Stephen Colbert began the final week of his nearly 11-year tenure on 'The Late Show' by showcasing previously unseen graphics and sketches that never aired. In a segment titled 'Graphics Graveyard,' n...

item.title: Chery eyes eventual entry into the US car market amid policy and tariff challenges
item.description: Chinese car manufacturer Chery, the country’s largest vehicle exporter, has indicated plans to eventually enter the massive United States market when the timing is right. Speaking at the company’s hea...

item.title: Comelec Proclaims Karl Josef Legazpi as New Pinoy Workers Party-List Representative in 20th Congress
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has officially proclaimed Karl Josef Legazpi as the new representative of the Pinoy Workers party-list in the 20th Congress. This development follows the resignat...

item.title: Molly-Mae Sparks Discussion Over Black Outfit at Venezuela Fury's Wedding
item.description: Molly-Mae Hague attracted significant attention after choosing to wear an all-black outfit to Venezuela Fury's wedding on the Isle of Man on May 16. The 26-year-old influencer, soon to welcome her sec...

item.title: Southampton expelled from Championship play-offs after admitting unauthorised filming of other clubs’ training
item.description: Southampton Football Club has been expelled from the Championship play-offs following a scandal involving the unauthorised filming of other clubs’ training sessions. The club had beaten Middlesbrough ...

item.title: US to Reduce Military Support to Nato, Expecting Europe to Take Lead
item.description: The Trump administration plans to reduce the number of US troops available for Nato during major crises, according to sources familiar with the matter. Under the Nato Force Model, member countries des...

item.title: Islamabad Court Sentences Umar Hayat to Death for Murder of TikTok Star Sana Yousaf
item.description: In a detailed judgment issued on Wednesday, an Islamabad sessions court sentenced Umar Hayat, a 23-year-old TikToker and son of a retired government official, to death for the murder of 17-year-old so...

item.title: GOP Declines to Fund Trump-Endorsed Texas Candidate Amid Controversy
item.description: Following his recent primary victories, former President Donald Trump's influence in the Republican Party has faced pushback with his endorsement of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton. Paxton, who has ...
